plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan Summary

**Root cause:** Off-by-one error in `src/utils.ts` at line 7.

### The Bug
```typescript
// Current (buggy) — stops one element too early
for (let i = 0; i < items.length - 1; i++) {
```

### The Fix
```typescript
// Fixed — iterates through all elements including the last
for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
```

### Impact
This single character change (`- 1` removed) will fix **3 currently-failing tests**:
- `should process all items in the array` — last element `"FOO"` was skipped
- `should handle a single item` — the only element was skipped (since `0 < 0` is `false`)
- `should handle two items` — second element `"B"` was skipped

The 2 `sum` tests and the empty-array test are unaffected and already passing. After the fix, all 6 tests should pass.
